markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If QUAZAR wins the ESL Challenger League Europe Cup #1 2026: Brute vs. QUAZAR CS2 match originally scheduled for Jul 14, 2026 at 11:00 AM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The following market refers to the full match in the ESL Challenger League Europe Cup #1 2026: Brute vs. QUAZAR CS2 match originally scheduled for Jul 14, 2026 at 11:00 AM EDT
If the relevant match is postponed and not completed within 48 hours of its originally scheduled start time, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If the relevant match is cancelled before play begins, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If the relevant match is forfeited before any play occurs, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If the relevant match begins and is subsequently forfeited, the market will resolve according to the official result published by the governing body or tournament organizer.

Kalshi is not affiliated, associated, authorized, endorsed by, or in any way officially connected with the Governing League. All trademarks, logos, and brand names are the property of their respective owners.

markets.rules_primary: If Ferran Torres records at least 2 goals during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the France vs Spain professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 14, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the France vs Spain professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 14, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's goals scored.

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Jones / Viiala wins the Edward Papac / Stevens vs Jones / Viiala professional tennis match in the 2026 M25 Brisbane Round of 16 after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The following market refers to the Edward Papac / Stevens vs Jones / Viiala professional tennis match in the 2026 M25 Brisbane Round of 16 after a ball has been played. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), all markets will resolve to $0.50. If any player on either team does not participate in the match, even if a replacement plays and the match still takes place with some of the original players/teams, the event is considered a different match and all markets will be settled at $0.50. If a player/team withdraws or forfeits after a match has started, that team will resolve to No. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks).

Kalshi is not affiliated, associated, authorized, endorsed by, or in any way officially connected with the Governing League. All trademarks, logos, and brand names are the property of their respective owners.
